national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
national_schemes.description: Provides insurance coverage and financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.
national_schemes.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.

national_schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
national_schemes.description: Improves farm productivity by ensuring better irrigation facilities.

Kerala.name: Kerala State Crop Insurance Scheme
Kerala.description: State-level crop insurance support for farmers in Kerala.
Kerala.benefits: Financial aid for crop damage due to diseases and climate conditions.
Kerala.contact: Department of Agriculture Development & Farmers’ Welfare, Kerala

Kerala.name: Kerala Vegetable Development Programme
Kerala.description: Provides subsidies for vegetable cultivation and disease control.

Tamil Nadu.name: Tamil Nadu Crop Protection Scheme
Tamil Nadu.description: Financial support for crop disease prevention and pest management.
Tamil Nadu.benefits: Subsidy for pesticides and organic treatments.

Karnataka.name: Raitha Siri Scheme
Karnataka.description: Encourages cultivation of pulses and supports farmers financially.

Kerala.map_hint: Search 'Krishi Bhavan near me' in Google Maps
